form.formComment: Comes off a 29 day let-up. Most recently raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 9 at Gold Coast Hcp on March 14 over 1000m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Scampi carrying 54.5kg at $6.50. Before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 2.5 len at this track Hcp February 8 over 1000m defeating Goldsborough with 57.5kg at $1.80. Terrific chance to return to form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7). Comes off a 29 day let-up. Most recently raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 9 at Gold Coast Hcp on March 14 over 1000m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Scampi carrying 54.5kg at $6.50. Before that raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 2.5 len at this track Hcp February 8 over 1000m defeating Goldsborough with 57.5kg at $1.80. Terrific chance to return to form.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation second of 7 at Rockhampton Hcp December 9 over 1050m, a nose behind Doubting Eye carrying 58.5kg at $4. When resuming last campaign fifth of 10 at Gold Coast Hcp June 21 over 1000m, on heavy track; 7 len behind Chakra Boy carrying 51kg at $16. Goes well at the start of his campaigns.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-up. Finished off last preparation second of 7 at Rockhampton Hcp December 9 over 1050m, a nose behind Doubting Eye carrying 58.5kg at $4. When resuming last campaign fifth of 10 at Gold Coast Hcp June 21 over 1000m, on heavy track; 7 len behind Chakra Boy carrying 51kg at $16. Goes well at the start of his campaigns.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out under pressure in the final 100m.

form.formComment: Comes off a 29 day let-up. At the latest run 2nd in a small field at Ipswich Bm75 on March 14 over 800m, 0.7 len behind State In Texas with 58.5kg at $2.30. The start before that 2nd in a small field at Ipswich Bm68 on February 20 over 800m, 0.8 len behind State In Texas with 62kg at $2.40. Not far from the winner last time and can play a role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(7.5). Comes off a 29 day let-up. At the latest run 2nd in a small field at Ipswich Bm75 on March 14 over 800m, 0.7 len behind State In Texas with 58.5kg at $2.30. The start before that 2nd in a small field at Ipswich Bm68 on February 20 over 800m, 0.8 len behind State In Texas with 62kg at $2.40. Not far from the winner last time and can play a role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in onto State In Texas near the 600m.
Raced wide for the majority.
Began awkwardly.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 4th of 8 at this track Cl5 on March 29 over 1000m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Chalice Well carrying 58.5kg at $16. Previously second-up 5th of 11 at Eagle Farm Bm68 on May 7 over 1000m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Chakra Boy carrying 62kg at $31. No easier this time and is likely to struggle.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Second-up. First-up after four months 4th of 8 at this track Cl5 on March 29 over 1000m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Chalice Well carrying 58.5kg at $16. Previously second-up 5th of 11 at Eagle Farm Bm68 on May 7 over 1000m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Chakra Boy carrying 62kg at $31. No easier this time and is likely to struggle.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 600m became awkwardly placed on heels.
Slow to begin. Laid in under pressure over the concluding stages.
Began awkwardly. Passing the 200m, shifted out to improve.
Over the concluding stages, shifted in.
Slow to begin. Raced wide throughout.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 36-day let-up. Most recently came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 7 at Eagle Farm Bm75 on March 7 over 1000m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Moonhaven carrying 55.5kg at $7. The start before that held ground to the line 3rd of 8 at Ipswich Hcp on February 20 over 1100m, 0.6 len behind Emperor carrying 54kg at $11. Has ability and is sure to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Comes here off a 36-day let-up. Most recently came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 7 at Eagle Farm Bm75 on March 7 over 1000m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Moonhaven carrying 55.5kg at $7. The start before that held ground to the line 3rd of 8 at Ipswich Hcp on February 20 over 1100m, 0.6 len behind Emperor carrying 54kg at $11. Has ability and is sure to run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the 200m, shifted in and away from Taltarni Fields.
Slow to begin. Near the 100m, shifted in and brushed Super Daisy.
Bumped passing the 400m.
Held up for clear running rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: At the latest run rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd of 7 at Rockhampton Hcp on March 24 over 1100m, slow going nose behind Pride Of Venus with 51kg at $1.90. Before that favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 1.3 len at Rockhampton Cl4-Sw February 17 over 1200m in soft going defeating Henry's Blade with 57kg at $2.45. Can figure in the outcome again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). Before that favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 1.3 len at Rockhampton Cl4-Sw February 17 over 1200m in soft going defeating Henry's Blade with 57kg at $2.45. Can figure in the outcome again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide throughout.
Began awkwardly.
Near the 100m, shifted out.
Began awkwardly.
Shifted out under pressure in the home straight.

form.formComment: Half-brother to Group 1 winner Hayasugi. Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming ran last in a small field at Gold Coast Bm65 on March 7 over 1000m, slow going 7 len behind Tarps carrying 63kg at $16. Last start 3rd of 8 at Eagle Farm Bm68 on March 25 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Impact Zone with 58.5kg at $31. Top-three prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(9). Half-brother to Group 1 winner Hayasugi. Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming ran last in a small field at Gold Coast Bm65 on March 7 over 1000m, slow going 7 len behind Tarps carrying 63kg at $16. Last start 3rd of 8 at Eagle Farm Bm68 on March 25 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Impact Zone with 58.5kg at $31. Top-three prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 700m, improved onto heels and had to be steadied.
Near the 800m, severely tightened for room, checked and blundered.
Bumped on jumping.
Raced wide throughout.
Raced keenly on heels when the pace slackened approaching the 500m.
